description: The University is hosting the 3-day 'Global Tech Symposium' in the Main Auditorium starting next week. Create a location named 'Main Auditorium' and check out the following 7 AV assets to it: AV-PROJ-01, AV-PROJ-02, AV-MIC-01, AV-MIC-02, AV-MIC-03, AV-MIC-04, and AV-SW-01. Each checkout must include the note 'Global Tech Symposium', an Expected Checkin Date of '2026-03-16', and be assigned to the location rather than a user. Do not modify or check out any other assets in the system (such as AV-PROJ-03 or AV-MIC-05).
